Event: Auction 2026
Event Date: 26/01/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: E67
Bitter Poison

Enhancement: 1
Every once in a while, the fighter releases a poisoned bolt at the furthest enemy fighter. Upon hitting, the bolt deals 37600 / 53800 / 76800 / 102400 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 magical damage and poisons the target. The poisoned enemy fighter receives 42300 / 60500 / 86400 / 115200 / 144000 / 180000 / 225000 magical damage over 3 seconds. Attack speed and damage are reduced by 4% / 5% / 5% / 7% / 8% / 9% / 10% every second. Also, when the target uses weapon, armor, artifact, ring, amulet, or totem abilities while poisoned, it additionally receives 18800 / 26900 / 38400 / 51200 / 64000 / 80000 / 100000 magical damage. Damage can occur no more than once every 1 seconds.

Enhancement: 2
12000 Crit from the gems
Every once in a while, the fighter releases a poisoned bolt at the farthest enemy fighter. Upon hitting, the bolt deals 56400 / 80600 / 115200 / 153600 / 192000 / 240000 / 300000 magical damage and poisons. The poisoned enemy fighter receives 61200 / 87400 / 124800 / 166400 / 208000 / 260000 / 325000 magical damage over 4 seconds. Attack speed and damage are reduced by 9% / 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 14% / 15% every second. Additionally, when the target uses weapon, armor, artifact, ring, amulet, or totem abilities while poisoned, it receives an additional 37600 / 53800 / 76600 / 102400 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 magical damage and 2 closest enemy fighters are poisoned. The ability triggers no more than once every 1 seconds. Poisoned enemy fighters receive 47000 / 67200 / 96000 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 / 250000 magical damage over 3 seconds. Attack speed and damage are reduced by 4% / 5% / 6% / 7% / 8% / 9% / 10% every second.

Enhancement: 3
25000 Crit from the gems
Once in a while, the fighter releases a poisoned bolt at the farthest enemy fighter. Upon hitting, the bolt deals 75300 / 107500 / 153600 / 204800 / 256000 / 320000 / 400000 magical damage and poisons. The poisoned enemy fighter receives 80000 / 114200 / 163200 / 217600 / 272000 / 340000 / 425000 magical damage over 4 seconds. Attack speed and damage are reduced by 14% / 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 19% / 20% every second. Additionally, when the target uses weapon, armor, artifact, ring, amulet, or totem abilities while poisoned, it receives an additional 56400 / 80600 / 115200 / 153600 / 192000 / 240000 / 300000 magical damage and 2 nearest enemy fighters are poisoned. The ability triggers no more than once every 1 seconds. Poisoned enemy fighters receive 65900 / 94100 / 134400 / 179200 / 224000 / 280000 / 350000 magical damage over 3 seconds. Attack speed and damage are reduced by 9% / 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 14% / 15% every second. When the fighter hit by the poisoned bolt is no longer poisoned, he and all poisoned enemy fighters on the battlefield are stunned for 1 / 1,5 / 2 / 2,5 / 3 / 3,5 / 4 seconds.
